name: Bluesky Digital Assets Corp.
summary: Bluesky Digital Assets Corp. operates as a digital assets and AI software focused virtual mining company. It mines digital currencies, such as Bitcoin and Ether; and offers value-added technology services for the digital currency market, such as digital mining proprietary methods and applications. The company was formerly known as Gunpowder Capital Corp. and changed its name to Bluesky Digital Assets Corp. in December 2019. Bluesky Digital Assets Corp. is based in Toronto, Canada.
